subcodes.first_line: Praise and thanksgiving befit the King of Names, Who hath bestowed mystic pearls from the ocean of truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مالک اسما را لایق و سزاست که از بحر حقیقت لولو معانی بخشید و از
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Manifestation of God as educator
